self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Bygone Azure Teardrop (R1): after using an Elemental Skill, Normal Attack DMG increases by 4.8% every second and by an additional 9.6% per Normal Attack hit (once every 0.3s), up to a maximum of +48% Normal Attack DMG for the 14s duration. Modeled at the capped maximum. Normal Attack SPD +10% not modeled (non-combat).
